review_text:
Zara and Jerry are very professional and nice. I got my first session the same day as my consultation.
Tyler did my last session.  She was awsome!   She asked me if I needed any breaks while my laser session was going on and I told her no, But she gave me a little break anyway and I was really glad about that. She is very friendly and professional.  My tattoo that I am removing has lightened up alot.
I would definitely recommend Tyler to anyone for tattoo removal.
I had another tattoo removal session today. I'm so grateful for Tyler numbing my lower back with ice packs before  starting the session. Its over quickly! I can tell Tyler is very experienced and well trained. She always checks with me throughout the process to make sure im doing ok and she's OK with stopping if I need a break. When the service is over she goes over after-care instructions. My tattoo has lightened up alot! I'm so happy about that! This service is safe, quick and it works.
_________________________________________
UPDATE:
TREATMENTS ARE GOING VERY WELL. MY TATTOO IS ALMOST, COMPLETELY GONE! YAY! KIRSTEN, AMANDA AND DANIELLE ARE FRIENDLY, AMAZING AND VERY KNOWLEDGEABLE. They take the time to answer questions and even check with me to make sure I'm healing well and remind me of aftercare dos and don't. They are very professional and caring. Kirsten did my last procedure. She did a great job!
great location! I've been to a few others and this is the best. really great customer service and experienced technicians.

Great customer service so far. Process is going well.
Always on point.

Highly recommend this location , all staff are very friendly and caring.  They always check on my to make sure everything is okay and if I have any questions or concerns.   Treatments are always quick !
So happy to be seeing amazing results already! The staff at the Katy Removery location are very knowledgeable, professional, and kind. They help to make this painful process as pleasant as possible.
Best team  . Kirsten is the goat !!
In and out. Very talented work staff! Respectful and professional. Process is super easy! Second session done and already seeing great results! -Jon
She was outstanding
Thank you Removery, so far the process has been smooth. Thank you to the staff as well! Highly recommend for anyone looking into tattoo removal

Danielle, Kirsten, and Amanda were all amazing. They were very friendly and even checked in on me after my appointment, which was so thoughtful.

They showed me photos of people with my same skin tone who had tattoos in a similar area and their results. That made me feel really confident moving forward. I also got a 15 percent off deal for full tattoo removal with unlimited sessions, so I had to take it.

I plan to keep going until my tattoo is completely gone. I will post before and after photos next year around this time, or share progress updates along the way. I went in for a consultation on 4/11 and they were able to start my treatment the same day. Best decision I have made.

Kirsten is doing my treatments. She is very kind and made sure I felt comfortable the whole time. She held an ice pack on my tattoo to help numb the area before starting and took her time, which helped me relax. During the laser removal process, she blew cold air through a tube onto the area, which really helped reduce the pain.

I am so glad I chose Removery after wanting this tattoo gone for so many years!! ♥️
Excellent staff. Knowledgeable, friendly and professional. Thank you Removery Tattoo Removal of Houston, TX!!
The staff was very friendly and informative
The girls at Removery were so kind and informative. I felt confident and comfortable throughout the quote process and went straight into my first treatment. Can’t wait for the next one!

The assistance that was provided was exceptional!  Danielle and Kristen was awesome! They were both very welcoming and informative about the process.  They made sure the atmosphere had a positive vibe
Danielle and Kristen are the best!

Update: Do not be more than 5 minutes late. They will not see you and then take a lunch break.

Danielle and Kristen were great! I’ve been putting off having my tattoos removed and I’m so happy that I moved forward with it! They made me feel comfortable during the whole process and I’m so relieved to be doing it through Removery. If you’re hesitant about removing your tattoos, don’t be! It really doesn’t hurt and it’s well worth it!

I just had my 8th laser session and im loving the results from my tattoo removal procedure. My tattoo is fading slowly and there is no scaring or damage to my skin. The staff at Removery Katy is very professional making every moment comfortable as they possibly can.
I have nothing but great things to say about Removery, especially the Katy location. Great service and luckily for me, I’m in and out in less than 20 seconds.

Very nice people Specially Danielle, she very sweet through the process with you, talks you through it 10/10 recommend. This was my first session ever getting anything like this and she made less nervous for me! 🫶🏽

Everyone was so nice and helpful with the process. This is my first time getting a tattoo removed and they helped me through every step of the way. Like in what financing option is best for me and what to expect with each tattoo session. I’m excited to get my tattoo removed haha, they even reach out to make sure everything is good with aftercare
Great  people and very professional
Great experience! Very fast procedure and they made sure you understood everything!
The girls at Katy removery are always very kind & accommodating!  My tattoos are fading nicely & one is almost completely gone!
Danielle, Kirsten and Amanda at the katy office are always so helpful! In and out in 5 minutes every visit😄 fast and efficient
Danielle and her team are amazing. Always helping me with my questions or concerns. I appreciate you all!
Danielle is always getting me in and out super fast and is always easy going about the whole process. Great expulsion everytime I have a session here. Thanks again!

I had an amazing experience at Removery! From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable and well-informed about the entire tattoo removal process. They took the time to explain what to expect, answered all my questions, and never made me feel rushed or pressured.

The treatments themselves were quick and much more manageable than I expected. The team is incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about your results and comfort. The facility is also very clean and welcoming, which made a huge difference for me.

I’ve already started seeing great results and couldn’t be happier with my decision to come here. If you’re considering tattoo removal, I highly recommend Removery—you’ll be in great hands!
I’m just beginning my tattoo removal process with Removery in Katy and I am so happy to say the least. The team here is amazing, sweet, and caring throughout the whole procedure.
Amazing experience. First time getting a tattoo removal they made it so knowledgeable and easy. Thank you guys.
I am having a great experience with Removery. The staff is very professional and knowledgeable. they make the process really easy. I am only on my third session but I am excited to see the progress.

Just had my first session at Recovery Tattoo and it was a great experience. Super clean shop, professional staff, and the artist really pays attention to detail. They made sure I was comfortable the whole time and explained everything clearly. If the first session is any indication, this is going to turn out amazing. Highly recommend!!
Absolute best place for tattoo removal!
Removery is the best.  Very professional and knowledgeable.  Always flexible and willing to work with you!

I have been in the process of removing my tattoo for almost 2 years now, it is slowly but surely getting there! Every time I go in, they are attentive, fast and friendly with getting me booked for my next appointment, doing the process and informing me of what to look forward to at my next appointment. I would recommend removery to anyone looking to get something removed!
Amazing experience with Danielle, Kristen, and Amanda! They’re professional, kind, and have made my whole process comfortable and easy. Highly recommend!
Welcoming experience for my first time visit. They made this process smooth for me. I was a little nervous at first until the staff uplifted me with courtesy words. Thank you!
Great, professional and friendly staff!  Super clean building and quick process from start to finish- would definitely recommend!
Danielle and Kirsten at the Katy office has excellent customer service very knowledgeable and professional they made my first time visit so easy and comfortable

All the ladies from Removery are so welcoming and are always making sure I’m doing well with my after care on my Removery laser appointments. They are always on top of it and lovely to have conversations with. Love that I picked this Removery out of the others!!!
Another good experience this visit.
I really like it here. The scheduling is right on time. Quick and easy. Super friendly service. I'm about halfway through and my tattoo is fading nicely.
I had a great experience at this location, the staff is very friendly and professional! The results have been great. I highly recommend this location for anyone considering tattoo removal.

Had my consultation last Saturday. Danielle was very informative and friendly and I decided to start my tattoo removal journey the same day! The team is great and I look forward to seeing them every 6 weeks until my tatt is gone.

Session 5 is in the books! Everything has been fantastic with my sessions.

Session 7 on the books! Everything is still going well. Recovery after each session hasn't been too bad and the staff continues to be great!

Another great experience at removery Katy..... I can't remember my tech name ... That's just old age..lol .. but always a pleasure to see her... She was a one man show on Friday checking me in and doing my session I was in and out in minutes...

Decided to come to Removery after having a few sessions on my tattoo elsewhere, and wow what a difference! The staff is very kind and knowledgeable, and the actual removal process was so much quicker and less painful! Highly recommend.
